// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: KeyLength
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>

class fastdata final {
    static constexpr char ToLowerAscii(char value)
    {
        if (value >= 'A' && value <= 'Z')
            return static_cast<char>(value + 32);
        return value;
    }

    static constexpr char GetFirstChar(std::string_view str) { return str[0]; }
    static constexpr char GetFirstCharLower(std::string_view str) { return ToLowerAscii(GetFirstChar(str)); }
    static constexpr char GetLastChar(std::string_view str) { return str[str.length() - 1]; }
    static constexpr char GetLastCharLower(std::string_view str) { return ToLowerAscii(GetLastChar(str)); }
    static constexpr uint32_t GetLength(std::string_view str) { return static_cast<uint32_t>(str.length()); }

    static constexpr bool StartsWith(std::string_view prefix, std::string_view str)
    {
        if (str.length() < prefix.length())
            return false;

        for (size_t i = 0; i < prefix.length(); ++i)
        {
            if (str[i] != prefix[i])
                return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    static constexpr bool StartsWithIgnoreCase(std::string_view prefix, std::string_view str)
    {
        if (str.length() < prefix.length())
            return false;

        for (size_t i = 0; i < prefix.length(); ++i)
        {
            if (ToLowerAscii(str[i]) != ToLowerAscii(prefix[i]))
                return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    static constexpr bool EndsWith(std::string_view suffix, std::string_view str)
    {
        if (str.length() < suffix.length())
            return false;

        size_t offset = str.length() - suffix.length();
        for (size_t i = 0; i < suffix.length(); ++i)
        {
            if (str[offset + i] != suffix[i])
                return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    static constexpr bool EndsWithIgnoreCase(std::string_view suffix, std::string_view str)
    {
        if (str.length() < suffix.length())
            return false;

        size_t offset = str.length() - suffix.length();
        for (size_t i = 0; i < suffix.length(); ++i)
        {
            if (ToLowerAscii(str[offset + i]) != ToLowerAscii(suffix[i]))
                return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 3> offsets = {
        0, 1, 2
    };

    inline static const std::array<int32_t, 3> values = {
        1, 2, 3
    };

    static constexpr std::array<std::string_view, 3> keys = {
        u8"a", u8"aa", u8"aaa"
    };

    public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {
        uint32_t getLength;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength < 1u))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getLength > 3u))
        {
         return false;
        }



        size_t idx = key.length() - 1;
        return key == keys[idx];
    }

    [[nodiscard]]
    static bool try_lookup(const std::string_view key, const int32_t*& value) noexcept {
        uint32_t getLength;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength < 1u))
        {
         value = nullptr;
         return false;
        }

        if ((getLength > 3u))
        {
         value = nullptr;
         return false;
        }



        size_t idx = key.length() - 1;
        if (key == keys[idx]) {
            value = &values[offsets[idx]];
            return true;
        }

        value = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 3;
    static constexpr size_t min_key_length = 1;
    static constexpr size_t max_key_length = 3;
    static constexpr bool has_number = false;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = false;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
